queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT 
    date, 
    division, 
    index 
FROM openmalaysia.mart_cpi_headline
WHERE date BETWEEN '${inputs.cpi_dates.start}' AND '${inputs.cpi_dates.end}'
ORDER BY date ASC
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT 
    date, 
    division, 
    index 
FROM openmalaysia.mart_cpi_headline
WHERE date BETWEEN '${inputs.cpi_dates.start}' AND '${inputs.cpi_dates.end}'
ORDER BY date ASC
